components.name: Genomic Longevity Index Dial
components.description: Semicircular 0-100 composite index dial, Schibsted Grotesk display number, coral accent stroke.

components.name: Modality Coverage Chip
components.description: Data-provenance pill naming a connected modality and its signal count.

components.name: Genetic Superpower Card
components.description: Green-left-border genetic superpower call-out with gene name, effect, and rarity.

components.name: Editorial Primary Button
components.description: Coral editorial CTA with slight rounding.

components.name: Biomarker Panel Row
components.description: Single biomarker row with name, value, unit, and optimal/watch/attention status pill.

components.name: Editorial Section Header
components.description: Section title in Schibsted Grotesk display with optional subtitle.

components.name: Action Plan Item
components.description: Evidence-graded intervention with tier, description, and source citation.

startingPoints.name: Full healthspan dossier page
startingPoints.description: Single-page editorial dossier with all 8 sections in vertical scroll.
startingPoints.build: compose the 8 layout sections in order: index-hero, modality-coverage, biomarker-panel, genetic-edges, polygenic-risk, aging-hallmarks, clinician-context, action-plan. Bind each section to live API data from GET /dashboard-specs/{analysis_id}.

startingPoints.name: Healthspan dashboard with private link
startingPoints.description: Render analysis at /dashboards/private/{token} using the foreverbetter house design.
startingPoints.build: POST /dashboard-links with design_id: foreverbetter, then serve the private dashboard URL to the user.

templates.name: Dossier section template
templates.description: A single editorial section with dossier-header, content area, and optional action items.

templates.name: Metric hero template
templates.description: Large number display with label, trend indicator, and provenance footnote.

source: code-defined from wellnizz design-systems.ts, no external handoff bundle
